report.summary: Cycle-close ~1h delta — production stable on 674W9yNzq (fresh redeploy, 3m 59s); 1b4a15e build failure persists 5h+; 287 pages live (+1 vs last cycle); all 6 API routes structurally healthy; carry-overs unchanged (rate limiting 0/6, fallback gaps 5/6, Vercel trial 9 days).

sections.title: QA
items: ✅ Production site stable — current deploy 674W9yNzq is Ready (35m ago, 3m 59s build, redeploy chain continues)
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Vercel build FAILED for commit 1b4a15e (D9UZMqaEz → Error, 2m 3s, now 5h+ ago) — Sprint 59 ecosystem/courses routes still not live in production

⚠️ TypeScript errors persist: 57 errors across 2 files — src/components/AICourseRecommendations.tsx (new this cycle, JSX parse errors) and src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (carry-over) — non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors:true
⚠️ AICourseRecommendations.tsx is a new TS error source vs last cycle — added by 1b4a15e commit, likely root cause of build failure
⚠️ Page audit: 100/287 published pages still missing page.tsx files — carry-over, unchanged from last cycle
✅ next.config.ts build safety settings confirmed intact: ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false, output:standalone

sections.title: Data Pipeline
items: ✅ All 6 public API routes present and structurally healthy: /api/prices, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields

✅ Cache TTLs verified and unchanged — prices: 60s, fear-greed: 600s (10min), trending: 300s (5min), market-dominance: 300s, market-metrics: 60s, defi-yields: 300s (CACHE_DURATION) — all with stale-while-revalidate headers
✅ All routes confirmed to implement in-memory cache layer; stale fallback pattern present
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting (checkRateLimit) still 0/6 routes implemented — open since Sprint 38
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA missing from 5/6 routes — only market-dominance has it; prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields remain unprotected on total API failure
✅ No rate limit errors, stale-cascade events, or API failures detected this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: ✅ Current production: 674W9yNzq — Ready, 3m 59s, deployed 35m ago (redeploy chain, production code still from d3bce36)
✅ Build time improved: 3m 59s vs 4m 19s last cycle — within healthy range, well under 5min target
⚠️ 5+ manual redeployments in last 5h — all bypass failed 1b4a15e; production code remains d3bce36 (Day 15 publish batch, NOT Sprint 59 ecosystem fix)
🔴 Platform alert: Vercel Pro trial expires in 9 days (was 10 last cycle) — payment method must be added to avoid interruption
⚠️ Dubai region (dxb1) still unavailable — Vercel auto-routing traffic, no user-facing impact confirmed
✅ No error spikes, latency anomalies, or performance regressions observed in deployment logs

sections.title: Project Manager
items: ✅ LIVE: 287 pages in production (+1 vs 286 last cycle) — single page delta likely from a late queue promotion
✅ Sprint 59 code (1b4a15e) is committed: App Store v2, 176 dApps, ecosystem tabs, courses hub — blocked by AICourseRecommendations.tsx JSX errors causing build failure
🔴 BLOCKER: Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx JSX parse errors (lines 96, 126-127) — root cause of 1b4a15e build failure, blocking all Sprint 59 ecosystem/courses content from reaching production
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting (0/6 routes) — security gap, unimplemented since Sprint 38
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Fallback data gaps (5/6 routes) — resilience gap on API outages
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: 100 pages in published-pages.ts without page.tsx — needs audit and cleanup or restoration
📌 ACTION for Jefe: (1) Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx to unblock Sprint 59 launch, (2) Add Vercel payment method within 9 days, (3) Decide on rate limiting sprint priority
